title: Xandel Carivus

{{Quote|The man is a pampered bureaucrat, a slave to the system. He has no vision…and no spine.|[[Norym Kim]]|<ref name="Council of Blood 1" />}}
'''Xandel Carivus''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]]. He came from a wealthy family which had the long ties to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]—so when Xandel was old enough he became a bureaucrat to serve the Imperial cause.

He was one of the several high ranking Imperials to help fund the work of [[Carnor Jax]], therefore guaranteeing that the [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] bodies of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] would die prematurely. Jax would assume the throne of the Emperor, but would eventually be killed by [[Kir Kanos]]. It was following this that [[Nom Anor]] manipulated events so that Xandel Carivus would be elected by the [[Imperial Ruling Council/Legends#The "Council of Blood"|Interim Ruling Council]] to become the Empire's new ruler. Carivus was eventually caught by Kanos and was quickly executed for his part in the death of Palpatine's clones.

Xandel was the last Imperial ruler to claim the title of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] until [[Jagged Fel]].

==Biography==
===Working with Nom Anor===
[[File:Carivus.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Nom Anor surprises Carivus.]]
Xandel Carivus was a pompous bureaucrat who was part of a wealthy family. Xandel invested a large portion of his wealth into [[Carnor Jax]]'s cause. With the money of Carivus and several other Imperial higher-ups, Jax bribed Emperor [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] [[Emperor's physician|personal physician]] into sabotaging Palpatine's [[Cloning/Legends|clones]], thus leading to an early death for the Emperor.<ref name="Handbook">[[Star Wars Handbook 2: Crimson Empire|''Star Wars Handbook'' 2: ''Crimson Empire'']]</ref>

With Palpatine out of the way, Jax was quick to move in on the throne—Jax placed everyone that had financed his plan into the [[Imperial Ruling Council/Legends#The "Council of Blood"|Interim Ruling Council]] with himself at the head. Now serving as a part of the head of the Empire, Xandel decided to relax, earning the disgust of many people on the council. During this time, he formed his own [[Xandel Carivus's Private Guard|private guard]] for his personal protection. However, mere months after Jax had established himself as the new Emperor, he was killed by [[Kir Kanos]] in a [[Duel in The Squall|duel]] on [[Yinchorr/Legends|Yinchorr]].<ref name="Handbook" /> From reports by Imperials at the time, the council knew that Kanos had killed Jax for his role in the death of the Emperor, and that he had vowed to kill everyone that had supported Jax's plan. This threw the Council into an uproar; few on the council believed that one man would be able to do such a feat, but many members believed that they would not be able to hold power after the death of Jax. The council established [[Burr Nolyds]] as their head and decided to meet at a resort in [[De-Purteen]], the capital of [[Ord Cantrell/Legends|Ord Cantrell]].<ref name="Council of Blood 1" />

When [[Nom Anor]] came from [[Yuuzhan Vong]] space,<ref name="VP">''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]''</ref> he recognized Carivus as the perfect person to complete his aims of weakening [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] at large. Anor knew that the rest of the council despised Carivus as an idiot and a coward. If he could make them believe that the position of head of the council was a dangerous one, they would most likely place the most hated person there. Anor met with Carivus and convinced him to help assassinate Nolyds. Using an explosive [[message disk]]<ref name="Council of Blood 1" /> that carried the crest of Kanos from his days as a Royal Guardsmen,<ref name="Council of Blood 2">[[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 2|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 2]]</ref> Anor killed Nolyds. Anor's plan went perfectly—knowing that the head of the council was now a target, Carivus was voted resoundingly as the Empire's new leader.<ref name="Council of Blood 1" />

===Leading the Council===
[[File:NomAnorAndWayneKnight-CEIIv3.jpg|thumb|250px|Carivus converses with Nom Anor in his private quarters.]]
Carivus believed that Anor wanted to rule the Empire with his people replacing the council as the new leaders. However, Anor's plan was far more sinister—He hoped to cause a civil war between Human and alien species within the Empire. To this end Nom Anor killed two more Human members on the council, [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Llon Banjeer|Banjeer]] and [[General/Legends|General]] [[Immodet]], to increase tension between the Human and alien members of the council. One of the Human members of the council, [[Feena D'Asta]], who feared for her own safety, called for a vote of no-confidence in Carivus after these assassinations. Although the vote failed miserably (no one else wanted to put themselves in any more danger than they already were), Carivus held a lasting grudge against Feena.<ref name="Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood">''[[Star Wars: Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood]]''</ref>

Following these assassinations, and on the orders of Anor, Carivus arrested every nonhuman member on the council. However, Carivus also had Feena D'Asta arrested on his own initiative for her role in trying to remove him from power. Days after expelling the nonhuman members from the council, there was an assassination attempt on Carivus. The attempt was put down, however Imperial troops discovered that a [[Xandel Carivus (clone)|clone]] of Carivus had been with the assassins. Unbeknownst to Carivus, the Feena D'Asta that he had arrested had been a clone under the power of the criminal organization [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]]. When he arrested her, Black Sun was blind to the council's dealings and had planned to replace Carivus with a clone which they could then control.<ref name="Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood" />

After the assassination attempt, Carivus began to believe that he was more important than Anor had initially made him believe. Under his own initiative, Carivus disbanded the rest of the council and declared himself Emperor.<ref name="Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood" />

====Departure of the Yuuzhan Vong====
{{Quote|Those I represssent have new plansss… plansss that no longer include ''you''.|Nom Anor|<ref name="Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood" />}}
[[File:Carvisdeath.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Carivus's death at the hands of Kir Kanos.]]
The abolition of the Interim Council did not fit in with Anor's plan at all. Instead of the aliens holding a grudge against the Humans, they blamed Carivus exclusively for the problems that had persisted. Carivus had inadvertently made himself the scapegoat for the misdealings of the Empire and had actually united the rest of the Empire against him.<ref name="Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood" />

Confronting Carivus, Anor showed his outrage at Carivus's actions by telling him that his masters had made new plans—ones that no longer included him. In his final statement, Anor warned Carivus that Kir Kanos was in the building and was coming to kill him. Secretly, Anor had also poisoned Carivus as a back-up plan should Kanos fail in his mission.<ref name="Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood" />

Imprisoning Feena proved to be Carivus's biggest mistake. [[Baron/Legends|Baron]] [[Ragez D'Asta]], who was enraged by Carivus appointing himself Emperor and imprisoning his daughter, arrived at Ord Cantrell to rescue Feena. Using his entire fleet, Ragez [[Battle of Ord Cantrell|broke through]] Carivus's defenses and demanded an immediate audience with Carivus. Secretly Kanos was within the Baron's landing party with the intention of killing Carivus, but with Nom Anor's warning, Carivus knew that Kanos was probably in the Baron's entourage. He ordered his personal [[Xandel Carivus's Private Guard|Guards]] to kill everyone in the Baron's landing party. Trying to make a hasty retreat out of a back entrance, Carivus was caught by Kanos and quickly executed for his part in the death of Emperor Palpatine.<ref name="Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood" />
